headline: Jim Cramer on Mastercard: “Very Strong Quarter in the Face of a Very Tricky Economic Backdrop”
summary: Mastercard Incorporated (NYSE:MA) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted, as he discussed the massive AI infrastructure buildout. Cramer explained why the stock “got hit,” as he said: What just happened to the stock of one of my longtime favorites, Mastercard? This morning, the payments company reported what I thought was a very strong quarter […]

headline: Berkshire’s Greg Abel Marks His First Annual Meeting as CEO. We’d Give Him a B-Plus.
summary: The conglomerate’s stock is down 6% this year, with the Class A shares finishing Friday trailing the S&P 500 by 11 percentage points.

headline: MA Q1 Deep Dive: Cross-Border Headwinds and Value-Added Services Drive Diverging Trends
summary: Global payments technology company Mastercard (NYSE:MA) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 15.8% year on year to $8.40 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.60 per share was 4.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
